title: peucedanum officinale subsp. brachyradium
intro: Peucedanum officinale subsp. brachyradium, also known as the lesser hemlock or small hemlock, is a subspecies of the Peucedanum officinale plant, a flowering plant native to Europe and western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Peucedanum officinale subsp. brachyradium include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
